item.title: Keo line e daray, ar karo piche line daray. Revoo Bangladesh

item.title: bangladeshs first ever hyper aesthetic studio for photo and video shoots. Creati...
item.description: bangladeshs first ever hyper aesthetic studio for photo and video shoots. Creative artists, directors, brands and clients are now most welcome.

item.title: Welcome to the Brownfish Studio The first ever hyper aesthetic studio in Banglad...
item.description: Welcome to the Brownfish Studio The first ever hyper aesthetic studio in Bangladesh the only studio with indoor parking for car shoots over 18 unique modular backdrops In-house Cafeteria General makeup room VIP LOUNGE with private washroom and changing Cleanest toilets maintained everyday Dedicated female toilet play corner for artists who are parents Shower facility Front porch in house post production team available Casting and creators management massive inventory of life size and imported props Restricted access for better maintenance Podcasts • Commercials • photos • tech • automotive • Reels • film • portfolio • music Reception Mezanin floor with wooden stairs secured with 17 cameras and face lock access equipped with instant production set up Set built on demand available Current pricing is only limited to the 30th of may 2026. VIP : 100,000 bdt Full day with unlimited access to all props, zones , backdrops, lights , camera , lenses (9:00 am to 9:00 pm) Premium : 50,000 bdt. unlimited access to all props, zones , backdrops, lights , camera , lenses per session. Total three sessions are available in a day. 10am to 2pm • 2pm to 6pm & 6pm to 10pm. Silver : 15,000 bdt per hour Access to all back drops and props, general make up room and Lights.
